creator: denny.hoglund@loopia.se
text:
The 2017Q3 branch does not include postgres95 version 9.5.8, only 9.5.7 whereas this verison has a few vulnerabilities:

https://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/982872f1-7dd3-11e7-9736-6cc21735f730.html

Is it possible to update the quartely branch to include the latest postgres95 version?
